zh_CN.device_offline_msg: 您的 WeClaw PC 端当前离线，消息将在其上线后自动发送
zh_CN.no_device_bound_msg: 您还没有绑定 WeClaw PC 端，请在设置中完成设备绑定
zh_CN.device_busy_msg: 您的 WeClaw PC 端正忙，请稍后再试
zh_CN.device_reconnecting_msg: WeClaw PC 端正在重新连接中，请稍候
zh_CN.message_queued_success: 消息已保存，将在设备上线后发送
zh_CN.connection_restored: 连接已恢复，正在同步离线消息

en_US.device_offline_msg: Your WeClaw PC is currently offline. Messages will be sent automatically when it comes online.
en_US.no_device_bound_msg: You haven't bound a WeClaw PC yet. Please complete device binding in settings.
en_US.device_busy_msg: Your WeClaw PC is busy. Please try again later.
en_US.device_reconnecting_msg: WeClaw PC is reconnecting. Please wait.
en_US.message_queued_success: Message saved and will be sent when device comes online.
